EXPLANATION: The dataset exists as a real, dedicated Hugging Face dataset page at the cited URL under the account "KisanVaani" — "KisanVaani" is the dataset owner/uploader on Hugging Face, not a mismatch. The automated checker's "author mismatch" flagging "Hugging Face" as the actual author is a limitation of the checker, as Hugging Face is merely the hosting platform, while KisanVaani is the legitimate dataset creator/owner.
